https://www.ipaustralia.gov.au/news/item.title: Trade Marks Fee Update 2025
https://www.ipaustralia.gov.au/news/item.description: IP Australia has updated trade mark application fees effective 1 July 2025.
https://www.ipaustralia.gov.au/news/item.content_encoded: IP Australia has updated trade mark application fees effective 1 July 2025. The new fee for a standard application will be $330 per class.

https://www.ipaustralia.gov.au/news/item.title: Patent Opposition Changes
https://www.ipaustralia.gov.au/news/item.description: Changes to the patent opposition process take effect from 1 August 2025.
https://www.ipaustralia.gov.au/news/item.content_encoded: The Intellectual Property Laws Amendment Act 2025 introduces changes to the patent opposition process, including extended time limits and new grounds of opposition.
